text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp. It's a
period of intense training where racers can
improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
At last, it's time for our school-sanctioned
overnight field trip!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You'd better stay on your toes, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: This is a sleepover, after all...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Blink, and you never know what pulse-pounding
moment you'll miss!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Just what heart-racing surprises await us? Squee!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Just thinking about it is getting me so jazzed I
can't sit still!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several hours later, our bus arrives at the
campsite.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After getting way too worked up on the ride over,
Gold Ship is practically sleepwalking now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've got a bad feeling about this trip, but I'll still
do my best to make sure everything goes well!
